objective: Go to example.com and return the heading text

Navigate to data:text/html;charset=utf-8,%3C!doctype%20html%3E%3Cbutton%20id%3D%22go%22%20style%3D%22margin%3A80px%3Bwidth%3A160px%3Bheight%3A54px%22%3ETrust%20Check%3C%2Fbutton%3E%3Cdiv%20id%3D%22out%22%3Enot%20clicked%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3Cscript%3Ego.addEventListener(%22click%22%2C%20e%20%3D%3E%20out.textContent%20%3D%20e.isTrusted%20%3F%20%22trusted%22%20%3A%20%22synthetic%22)%3C%2Fscript%3E, click the Trust Check button with real browser input, and return the #out text. The answer must be trusted, not synthetic.
Navigate directly to https://www.booking.com/searchresults.html?ss=Tokyo&checkin=2026-06-10&checkout=2026-06-12, wait 5 seconds, then extract the first 5 hotel names and prices as JSON
Navigate to https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&company=Apple&type=10-K&dateb=&owner=include&count=5, wait 3 seconds, and return the most recent filing date and form type
Navigate to https://www.lesswrong.com, wait 3 seconds, and extract the titles of the first 3 posts on the front page
Navigate to https://httpbin.org/headers and return the User-Agent and Accept headers from the response JSON
Navigate to https://elgoog.im/2048/ and play one game by sending arrow-key wireActions, then extract a JSON snapshot containing the current score and maxTile from the iframe game state
